lemon_market_new_listings.description: The vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior paint and body are free of any scratches, dents, or imperfections. The interior remains in original condition with no signs of wear. All mechanical components are fully functional.
Good condition.

This vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant body damage and visible rust. The interior shows heavy wear and staining. Multiple mechanical systems require repair and are not currently fully functional.

Looking for a reliable vehicle that won't break the bank? This car is in fair condition and ready for its next adventure! While it shows some expected wear and tear from regular use, it remains a sturdy and functional choice for your daily commute. Grab a great deal on a car that still has plenty of miles left to give!

This vehicle is in good, reliable condition and has been well-maintained throughout its ownership. The exterior is in great shape overall, with only a few minor stone chips on the hood and a small scratch on the rear bumper consistent with normal use. Inside, the cabin is clean and comfortable, showing some light wear on the driver's seat bolster and steering wheel, but no tears or stains. Mechanically, the car drives smoothly; the engine and transmission perform well, and regular oil changes have been documented. It passed its last inspection without issues, though the front tires will likely need replacement within the next year. It is a solid, dependable choice for anyone looking for a well-cared-for vehicle that is ready for the road.

This vehicle is in fair condition, offering a solid foundation but requiring some attention to bring it back to its best. The engine is functional and starts without much trouble, though it occasionally exhibits a rough idle when stopped. The transmission remains operational, though the shifts aren't as crisp as they once were. Visually, the exterior shows its age with some clear coat peeling on the trunk and a few minor dents along the passenger side. The interior is clean but reflects years of use, with some staining on the carpets and a worn steering wheel. All major electronics work, though the rear power windows are slow to operate. It is a dependable car that is priced to reflect its current state and upcoming maintenance needs.

Presenting a distinguished vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This well-maintained example offers a superior balance of performance and value, having undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for reliability. An ideal acquisition for the discerning driver seeking a dependable, high-caliber driving experience with a proven service history.

Hey there! Are you looking for a reliable ride that’s been super well-cared for? This beauty has been my pride and joy, and it's still running like a champ! It’s in great shape and ready to hit the road for some new adventures. I’ve loved every mile in it, and I know you will too. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

Reliable daily driver. Good condition. Regular maintenance performed. Clean title. No mechanical issues.

Up for sale is a meticulously maintained vehicle that strikes the perfect balance between luxury and reliability. The exterior paint retains a deep, glossy finish, with only minor cosmetic imperfections consistent with careful road use. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean and smoke-free; the premium seating shows minimal wear, and all technological features—including the dual-zone climate control and infotainment system—are fully operational. Mechanically, this car is in excellent health, featuring a smooth-shifting transmission and a responsive engine that has been serviced strictly according to the manufacturer's schedule. Recent maintenance includes a fresh oil change, a brake inspection, and a tire rotation, ensuring it is ready for the road the moment you take the keys. I have kept a detailed log of service records to provide the next owner with complete peace of mind. This is a reliable, turn-key driver that offers a premium experience without the new-car price tag.

Hey there! I’m selling my reliable ride, and I honestly think you’re going to love it! It’s been super well-maintained and still runs like a dream. It’s in great shape inside and out, perfect for daily commutes or weekend getaways. I've taken really good care of it, and it’s ready for its next owner to jump in and go. Feel free to reach out if you have any questions—I'd love to see it go to a good home!

Offered is a mechanically sound E92 M3 featuring the high-revving S65 naturally aspirated 4.0L V8. This power plant utilizes individual throttle bodies and double-VANOS variable valve timing to deliver peak torque across a broad power band, screaming to an 8,400 RPM redline. The drivetrain is anchored by a precise 6-speed manual gearbox and an M-Variable limited-slip differential, ensuring optimal power delivery to the rear wheels. Recent preventative maintenance includes rod bearing replacement and updated throttle actuators, addressing common S65 pain points. The chassis remains taut with Electronic Damper Control (EDC) and refreshed bushings, providing exceptional lateral grip and communicative feedback. While the aesthetic reflects its status as a driven enthusiast's car, the mechanical synchronization and structural integrity are robust, making this a visceral choice for the purist collector.
Used vehicle. Good condition. Minor cosmetic wear. Mechanically sound. Regular service history. Clean title.

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies and high-pressure VANOS timing. The chassis is structurally sound with documented subframe reinforcement, paired with a crisp Getrag 420G 6-speed manual transmission. Performance is optimized via a factory-spec variable M differential lock and a refreshed suspension featuring Bilstein dampers. While the exterior shows honest patina consistent with its well-maintained status, the mechanical vitals—including rod bearing service and valve adjustments—are fully up to date, ensuring this high-revving icon remains both track-capable and street-refined.
